base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of mortar_shell — a projectile from 1987 contra. Arcing mortar projectile — falls in parabola. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
